item.title: Version 1.95
item.description:
Version 1.95

  • Now the app will export as Sentinel.app instead of SentinelPro.app
  • Point license API to Discord bot and add ATS exception for HTTP
  • Add premium license activation flow with success animation and feature gating
  • huge refactor + projects splitting + working on licensing system
  • Refactor codebase for consistency, modernize APIs, and clean up imports
  • Fixed a bunch of stuff
  • Fix bugs, improve performance, and clean up codebase
  • Add structured logging, replace ps with proc_pidinfo, and improve UI polish
  • Fixed a bunch of stuff in the settings window
  • Fixed keyboard funcs
